HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

IntegrandIntra Struct Reference

Structure representing the integrand of the intra-layer interactions of Green's function. More...

Detailed Description

Structure representing the integrand of the intra-layer interactions of Green's function.
